description: ScopeEnricher — scope (file/local), is_exported, binding_kind on forgeql-pub.frozen (node_id.rs). storage (static/extern) is C-specific and covered in a C-context suite.

cases.name: file_scope_exported_const
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='DEFAULT_SEGMENT_PREFIX_HEX' WHERE scope='file' WHERE is_exported='true' LIMIT 5

cases.name: binding_kind_variable
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='DEFAULT_SEGMENT_PREFIX_HEX' WHERE binding_kind='variable' LIMIT 5

cases.name: local_scope_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='variable' WHERE scope='local' LIMIT 100

cases.name: file_scope_count
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='variable' WHERE scope='file' LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_const_not_local
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE name='DEFAULT_SEGMENT_PREFIX_HEX' WHERE scope='local' LIMIT 5
